---
title: "ell_pad"
generated: true
description: "Pad ragged neighbour lists to a fixed `k_max`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.ell`](../nitrix-sparse-ell.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ell_pad -->
```python
ell_pad(values: Num[Array, 'm k_actual'], indices: Int[Array, 'm k_actual'], *, k_max: int, n_cols: int, identity: Any = 0.0, pad_index: int = 0) -> ELL
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ell_pad -->
Pad ragged neighbour lists to a fixed `k_max`.

Use this when constructing an [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell/ELL.qmd) from per-row lists whose
lengths vary up to `k_max`: `values[i, k_i:]` is filled with
`identity` and `indices[i, k_i:]` is filled with `pad_index`.
`pad_index` must be a valid row of the dense operand the ELL
will be contracted with (`0` works whenever `n_cols >= 1`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ell_pad -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `values` | `Num` | `m` × `k_actual` | — | Right-aligned per-row values, shape `(m, k_actual)` with `k_actual <= k_max`. |
| `indices` | `Int` | `m` × `k_actual` | — | Right-aligned per-row indices, shape `(m, k_actual)`. |
| `k_max` | `int` | — | — | Target padded width. |
| `n_cols` | `int` | — | — | Outer dim of the dense operand; recorded on the `ELL`. |
| `identity` | `Any` | — | `0.0` | Semiring identity to write into the pad positions. Defaults to `0` (the `REAL` identity). |
| `pad_index` | `int` | — | `0` | Row of the dense operand that pad positions reference. Must satisfy `0 <= pad_index < n_cols`. |

**Returns** `ELL`. The padded matrix, with `values` and `indices` of shape `(m, k_max)` and `n_cols` / `identity` recorded.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ell_pad -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `k_actual` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
